selling_points_predicted: Land inspiration to Avatar, the highest-grossing film of all time
Over 20,000 visitors every single day, testament to the park's popularity
Five distinct sections to explore: Yuanjiajie, Yangjiajie, Qianzi Mountain, Huangshi Village, and Golden Whip Stream
Best value through hotel booking: 210 yuan entrance plus 248 yuan for unlimited cable cars and elevator across four days
Record-breaking Bailong Elevator with double-decker design for rapid mountain access
Convenient face-scan entry system eliminates need for tickets or passports at checkpoints
Abundant food options throughout the park with street stalls and fresh local cuisine
First Bridge Under Heaven, a completely natural 350-meter high bridge between mountains
Scenic 15-minute cable car rides offering incredible mountain views from above
Peace and quiet available in various corners despite high visitor numbers
Wildlife encounters with monkeys throughout multiple areas of the park
Towering quartz sandstone pillar mountains that jut out of the earth create movie-like scenery
